title: Route continuation not triggered
description: Investigate whether current-tab navigation can enter a topic without invoking handleRouteChange/continueMainTopicBrowsingSession, leaving the session stuck.
hypothesis: Route listener or initialization misses the topic route after navigation.

title: Topic context wait blocks fallback
description: Investigate whether handleRouteChange waits too long or returns before continuation when topic context/timeline is slow but not unavailable.
hypothesis: waitForPageContext prevents continuation from returning to home on slow topic pages.

title: Timing request has no timeout
description: Investigate whether sendMainTopicTiming/fetch can hang indefinitely after topic loads, preventing returnToMainTopicSource.
hypothesis: The /topics/timings fetch has no timeout and can leave the user on the topic page.
